<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Build a dependency-light Nest provider for the focused message bridge token.

## Import

```ts
import { provideGraphMessageBridge } from "@graphrefly/ts/adapters/nestjs/microservices";
```

## Signature

```ts
function provideGraphMessageBridge(opts: GraphMessageBridgeOptions<THost> = {}): NestProviderBinding<GraphMessageBridge<THost>>
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `opts` | `GraphMessageBridgeOptions<THost>` | Options that configure the helper. |

## Returns

A `NestProviderBinding<GraphMessageBridge<THost>>` value.

## Example

```ts
import { provideGraphMessageBridge } from "@graphrefly/ts/adapters/nestjs/microservices";
```
